acceptanceCriteria.text: Admin can inspect scoring job states (queued, running, failed, dead)
Admin can edit active quest reward values
Admin can publish a new prompt pack version without redeploying

snapshot.description: Manage question content and prompt packs. View AI usage, costs, failures, and refunds. Configure quest reward values and plan pricing. Inspect and retry scoring jobs.
snapshot.title: Module 13: Admin console
